title: Brotein App Store landing copy — 'gap between macro tracking and degen eating'
html:
Brotein App Store / paywall mockup — Yahir's tagline: "The gap between macro tracking and degen eating." Four pillars: Scan Literally Anything (menu / nutrition label / any food → anabolic insights), Anabolic Menu Item Ranking ("go out to eat with the boys late night and be able to make the correct anabolic decision"), Muscle Building Discovery Database, Protein Streak Tracker (Snapchat-style streaks for hitting protein target). Price anchor: $3.72/mo billed annually ($44.99).

TL;DR

  • Tagline: "The gap between macro tracking and degen eating" — distills the Brotein thesis in one line.
  • Pricing: $44.99/yr ≈ $3.72/mo — the same $44.99 anchor that recurs across his July paywall iteration.
  • The Snapchat-streaks-for-protein mechanic is the social-retention hook — direct lineage to Yahir's Snap Map app / streak-app instincts.

brotein · bromenu · anabolic scoring · snapchat · fast food nutrition dataset

related.label: Paywall offer — '$47/yr ($4/mo) — No Payment Due Now'
